statement: In every magma, Equation 2825 (`x = ((y * z) * (w * x)) * u`) implies Equation 3995 (`x * y = (z * (x * y)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0336
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op w x)) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op x y)) w)
